error_codes.1: invalid COSE_Sign1 envelope structure or payload
error_codes.7: REVOKES issuer does not match revoked statement key
error_codes.8: CT log inclusion proof is invalid
error_codes.10: a required field has an invalid value

cddl:
AxiomPayload = {
  subject: bstr .size 32,
  predicate: uint .size 1 .ne 9 .ne 10 .ne 11 .ne 12 .ne 13 .ne 14 .ne 15 .ne 16 .ne 17 .ne 18 .ne 19,
  ? object: bstr .size 32,
  ? lineage: bstr .size 32,
  ? nonce: bstr .size 32,
  ? timestamp: uint,
  ? * uint => any
}

CoseSign1 = [
  protected: bstr,
  unprotected: {},
  payload: bstr,
  signature: bstr,
]

ProtectedHeader = {
  1: int,      ; algorithm
  4: bstr,     ; kid
  ? * int => any
}
